message:
feat(conformance): add test conformance framework and TLS enhancements

Conformance framework improvements:
- conformance/src/lib.rs: Core conformance test infrastructure
- conformance/src/logging.rs: Test logging utilities
- conformance/src/runner.rs: Test runner orchestration
- conformance/src/tests/mod.rs: Test module organization
- conformance/src/report.rs: Test report generation

TLS module enhancements:
- connector.rs: Additional TLS connector improvements
- mod.rs: Module documentation updates
- types.rs: Type refinements

Also includes repro_race_leak.rs test improvements.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
